blocks.text: Match preview: Australia Women face Pakistan Women in 21st Match, Group A (T20) on Tue, 23 Jun, 2026, 11:00 pm at Headingley Leeds. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
Classic English seaming conditions when clouds cover; batting paradise in sunshine.
Overcast · High 31°C / Low 16°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 16 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
